idea-plugin.name: Config Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Config Assistant

A lightweight YAML workspace inside IntelliJ IDEA for temporary config inspection, formatting, and comparison.

It is especially useful when comparing configuration differences across environments, reviewing service migration changes, or troubleshooting deployment issues without creating throwaway YAML files in your project.

Key Features

  • Project-level multi-view YAML workspace
  • Native IntelliJ Diff between saved views
  • In-place YAML formatting with comment preservation
  • Inline YAML validation feedback
  • Saved views persist after IDE restart
  • No need to create temporary local YAML files

Common Use Cases

  • Compare test and production YAML during troubleshooting
  • Review configuration changes during service migration
  • Keep before/after snapshots while adjusting config
  • Inspect copied YAML quickly without polluting the project

Getting Started

  1. Open Config Assistant from the right tool window bar.
  2. Click + to create saved views for different YAML variants.
  3. Paste YAML into each view. Views are stored at the project level.
  4. Use Format to normalize YAML content and keep it readable.
  5. Use Compare to select two saved views and open the native IntelliJ Diff window.
  6. Close extra views with the tab x. The first View is always kept.
  7. Invalid YAML is highlighted inline, and the status bar shows whether parsing succeeded.

中文简介

Config Assistant 是一个直接工作在 IntelliJ IDEA 里的轻量级 YAML 配置工作区，适合临时查看、整理和对比配置内容。

当你需要排查不同环境之间的配置差异、核对服务迁移前后的 YAML，或者临时查看别人发来的配置时，不需要再在本地项目里新建一次性 YAML 文件，用完再删除。

核心能力

  • 项目级多视图 YAML 工作区
  • 使用 IntelliJ 原生 Diff 对比已保存视图
  • 原地格式化 YAML，并尽量保留注释
  • 内联 YAML 校验反馈
  • 视图在 IDE 重启后仍可恢复
  • 不需要在项目里新建临时本地 YAML 文件

典型场景

  • 排查测试环境和生产环境配置差异
  • 服务迁移时核对新旧配置
  • 调整配置时保留 before / after 快照
  • 快速查看复制过来的 YAML，又不污染项目目录

快速开始

  1. 在右侧工具窗口栏打开 Config Assistant。
  2. 点击 + 创建多个保存视图，用来保存不同版本的 YAML。
  3. 将 YAML 粘贴到各个视图中，视图会按项目维度保存。
  4. 使用 Format 规范化 YAML 内容，保持格式整洁。
  5. 使用 Compare 选择两个保存视图，并打开 IntelliJ 原生 Diff 窗口。
  6. 通过 tab 上的 x 关闭多余视图，系统始终至少保留第一个 View。
  7. 非法 YAML 会在编辑区内联高亮，底部状态栏会显示解析结果。

action.description: View current YAML file as a tree structure
Format and beautify current YAML file
Open the Config Assistant workspace and compare saved YAML views
Convert between YAML and JSON formats
